news.t: Bitcoin surged in April, but weak buyer demand makes the rally vulnerable
GRANITESHARES HITS $6 BILLION AUM AS NVDL SURGES
A look at single-stock ETFs one year in

holdings.infoBox: CONL is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are Coin Equity Swap stock at 66.46%, Cash & Cash Equivalents at 46.13%, Recv Long 2X Coin Gs1 at 32.63%, Coin Equity Swap 1 at 31.40%, and Recv Long 2X Coin Bmo1 at 29.46%.

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long COIN Daily ETF (CONL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Coinbase stock. CONL was launched on Aug 9, 2022 and is issued by GraniteShares.

data.title: Bitcoin surged in April, but weak buyer demand makes the rally vulnerable
data.text: Bitcoin gained 12.7% in April, registering back-to-back monthly gains and its best month since April 2025. The run was driven by leveraged trading activity in the derivatives market while demand for t...

data.title: A look at single-stock ETFs one year in
data.text: As single-stock exchange-traded funds cross their one-year mark, interest in the products remains correlated with the popularity of its underlying stock.
